sourceQuote: As of March 31, 2026, we have $1,500 million available to borrow under the SpaceX Credit Facility. The cash we generate from our core operations also enables us to fund our research and development projects including our Starship rocket and next-generation satellites, the construction of future data centers, and the continued expansion of our AI-enabled products. In addition, because we expect a significant portion of our future expenditures to fund growth initiatives, we retain flexibility to adjust spending across segments.
